input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule EV.5.4.4 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ev.5.4.4
            TITLE: the accumulator isolation relays and any fuses must be separated from the rest of the

            CONTENT:
            rule EV.5.4.4: The Accumulator Isolation Relays and any fuses must be separated from the rest of the
EV.5.4.4 The Accumulator Isolation Relays and any fuses must be separated from the rest of the 
Accumulator with an electrically insulated and Nonflammable Material (F.1.18).

final_answer: The Accumulator Isolation Relays and any fuses must be separated from the rest of the Accumulator with an electrically insulated and Nonflammable Material (F.1.18).
